typecheck.details: no issues found in 28 source files

frontend-build.details: Built successfully (tsc + vite). One chunk size warning (1617 kB > 500 kB limit) — pre-existing, not introduced by this milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: 4 ruff lint violations in tests/test_walkthrough.py (unused imports, unsorted imports, line length) go undetected because the project only lints src/.
Minor AudioContext leak on mic denial — audioContextRef created before early return, cleaned up when stop() is called.

The 'interrupted' handler resets top-level toolActivity but does not update inline tool_activity transcript entries (unlike the error handler). Could leave a stuck spinner if user interrupts during an in-flight grounding search.
WebSocket open promise doesn't handle the case where WS transitions to CLOSED before OPEN (e.g., immediate server rejection), leaving a dangling promise. The outer error handling mitigates UX impact.
setErrorMessage on ws.onclose runs unconditionally for all close paths including clean user-initiated close. Benign because stop() already clears state and the overlay unmounts.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/frontend-knowledge.md to replace stale WalkthroughModal.tsx reference with the new walkthrough component directory (WalkthroughOverlay, WalkthroughTranscript, WalkthroughComposer, WalkthroughStarterPrompts, WalkthroughExplainer, types/walkthrough.ts).
Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to replace stale WalkthroughModal.tsx reference with the new walkthrough component paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the entry point reference 'frontend/src/components/WalkthroughModal.tsx: walkthrough voice modal' with 'frontend/src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughOverlay.tsx: walkthrough overlay shell' (and optionally list the sibling components WalkthroughTranscript, WalkthroughComposer, WalkthroughStarterPrompts, WalkthroughExplainer).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: WalkthroughModal.tsx was deleted in commit 6247dee. Three of four reviewers flagged the stale AGENTS.md reference.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update both worker skill SKILL.md files to replace 'frontend/src/components/WalkthroughModal.tsx' with 'frontend/src/components/walkthrough/WalkthroughOverlay.tsx' in step 2 / step 1.2 file lists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both skills point to the deleted WalkthroughModal.tsx. Flagged by 3 of 4 reviewers independently.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider documenting that the project uses @base-ui/react primitives (Dialog, Button) for complex interactive components alongside shadcn/ui composition and Tailwind styling. The current AGENTS.md mentions shadcn/ui but not base-ui.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: button.tsx uses @base-ui/react/button; WalkthroughOverlay.tsx uses @base-ui/react/dialog. Pattern is consistent but undocumented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider extending the ruff lint scope to include tests/ (currently only src/). This would catch lint violations in test files (4 violations found by reviewer in test_walkthrough.py).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: services.yaml lint command: 'uv run ruff check src/'. Running ruff on tests/ found F401, I001, E501 violations. AGENTS.md testing section only documents 'uv run ruff check src/'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the fullstack-worker skill that shadcn invocation (step 4) is only required for UI composition work, not for transport/hook/type-only features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The walkthrough-transport-and-test-foundation worker noted in skillFeedback that step 4's shadcn invocation was unnecessary for non-UI transport work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider relaxing the fullstack-worker skill step 5 requirement for agent-browser interactive verification when the feature is primarily test-coverage and backend-driven. The walkthrough-end-to-end-session-flows worker skipped browser verification but didn't document the deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker handoff has no interactiveChecks. Transcript shows no agent-browser usage. skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true with empty deviations, which is inconsistent with skipping step 5.

rejectedObservations.observation: Degraded banner Tailwind color pattern (yellow for degraded, red for error) is consistent with codebase
rejectedObservations.reason: No gap — reviewer was noting consistent pattern, not flagging an issue
